mapper.select:
SELECT a.application_id, a.status, a.apply_time, a.ai_evaluation_score, a.feedback, a.interview_time, a.rejection_reason,
j.job_id, j.title as job_title, j.job_type, j.location as job_location,
u.user_id, u.email, COALESCE(rs.full_name, sp.real_name) as full_name, rs.phone as phone,
r.resume_id, r.filename as resume_filename, r.file_url as resume_file_url, r.upload_date as resume_upload_date,
NULL as applicant_id, sp.gender, sp.birth_date as birthdate, sp.education_level, rs.work_years, rs.position as expected_position, COALESCE(rs.expected_salary_max, rs.expected_salary_min) as applicant_expected_salary, r.file_url as resume_url FROM applications a INNER JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id INNER JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON a.user_id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN resume rs ON a.user_id = rs.user_id AND rs.is_default = TRUE AND rs.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN resumes r ON a.resume_id = r.resume_id WHERE j.company_id = #{companyId}
AND a.status = #{status}
AND ( COALESCE(rs.full_name, sp.real_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.application_id, a.status, a.apply_time, a.ai_evaluation_score, a.feedback, a.interview_time, a.rejection_reason,
j.job_id, j.title as job_title, j.job_type, j.location as job_location, j.job_duty as job_description, j.job_requirements as job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary,
u.user_id, u.email, COALESCE(rs.full_name, sp.real_name) as full_name, rs.phone as phone,
r.resume_id, r.filename as resume_filename, r.file_url as resume_file_url, r.upload_date as resume_upload_date, r.parsed_data,
NULL as applicant_id, sp.gender, sp.birth_date as birthdate, sp.education_level, rs.work_years, rs.position as expected_position, COALESCE(rs.expected_salary_max, rs.expected_salary_min) as applicant_expected_salary, r.file_url as resume_url FROM applications a INNER JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id INNER JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON a.user_id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN resume rs ON a.user_id = rs.user_id AND rs.is_default = TRUE AND rs.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN resumes r ON a.resume_id = r.resume_id WHERE a.application_id = #{applicationId} AND j.company_id = #{companyId}

SELECT a.application_id, a.status, a.apply_time, a.ai_evaluation_score, a.feedback, a.interview_time, a.rejection_reason, a.created_at, a.updated_at,
j.job_id, j.title as job_title, j.job_type, j.location as job_location, j.job_duty as job_description, j.job_requirements as job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.post_date, j.expiration_date,
c.company_id, c.company_name, c.description as company_description, c.address as company_location,
r.resume_id, r.filename as resume_filename, r.file_url as resume_file_url, r.upload_date as resume_upload_date, r.parsed_data as resume_parsed_data FROM applications a INNER JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id LEFT JOIN resumes r ON a.resume_id = r.resume_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
